baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Neutral GMI. Income from this asset is tax-exempt in any year GMI ≥ 0. Aligns with Trustee's first-$1 RE exemption — stacks for double shelter.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Income from this asset is tax-exempt in any year GMI ≥ 0. Aligns with Trustee's first-$1 RE exemption — stacks for double shelter.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap on this asset; +1 additional if current value exceeds 12.

flavourText: The rent arrives whether you do or not.
